sections.paragraph:
Original: עפר

Transliteration: ‛âphâr

Phonetic: aw-fawr'

BDB Definition:

  1. dry earth, dust, powder, ashes, earth, ground, mortar, rubbish
    1. dry or loose earth
    2. debris
    3. mortar
    4. ore

Origin: from H6080

TWOT entry: 1664a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
